---
title: "Teaching Evaluations"
---

## Evaluation Trends Over Time

The plot below is generated from evaluation data extracted from the linked PDF summaries.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 9

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

rds_path <- "data/evals_data.rds"
if (!file.exists(rds_path)) {
  stop(
    "Evaluation data file not found at: ", rds_path, "\n",
    "Please run the build script to generate it:\n",
    "  ./build.sh\n",
    "Or generate it manually:\n",
    "  Rscript data/build_evals_data.R"
  )
}
evals <- readRDS(rds_path)

evals$role <- ifelse(
  grepl("TA", evals$course, fixed = TRUE),
  "UCLA (TA)",
  "UC Davis (Instructor of Record)"
)

metric_means <- evals %>%
  select(year, role, n_responses,
         overall_rating, instructor_effectiveness, course_organization) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(overall_rating, instructor_effectiveness, course_organization),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "rating"
  )

metric_sds <- evals %>%
  select(year, role,
         overall_rating_sd, instructor_effectiveness_sd, course_organization_sd) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = ends_with("_sd"),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "sd"
  ) %>%
  mutate(metric = sub("_sd$", "", metric))

evals_long <- metric_means %>% left_join(metric_sds, by = c("year", "role", "metric"))

metric_levels <- c("overall_rating", "instructor_effectiveness", "course_organization")
metric_labels <- c(
  overall_rating           = "Overall rating\n(1 = Poor … 5 = Excellent)",
  instructor_effectiveness = "Instructor effectiveness\n(1 = Poor … 5 = Excellent)",
  course_organization      = "Course was well-organized\n(1 = Strongly Disagree … 5 = Strongly Agree)"
)
evals_long$metric <- factor(evals_long$metric, levels = metric_levels, labels = metric_labels)

year_breaks <- sort(unique(evals$year))

ggplot(evals_long, aes(x = year, y = rating, shape = role, color = role)) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = pmax(rating - sd, 1), ymax = pmin(rating + sd, 5)),
    width = 0.4,
    linewidth = 0.5,
    alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_line(aes(group = role), linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n_responses)) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0("n=", n_responses)),
    vjust = -1.3,
    hjust = 0.5,
    size = 3,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ metric, ncol = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = year_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(1, 5), breaks = 1:5) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2.5, 5), name = "Respondents") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("UC Davis (Instructor of Record)" = "#2780E3",
                                "UCLA (TA)" = "#E67E22")) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Rating (mean ± 1 SD, clipped to scale)",
    color = "Role",
    shape = "Role",
    caption = paste(
      "Each panel shows a single survey item; items use different Likert anchors and aren't directly comparable.",
      "UCLA TA evaluations used a 9-point scale (1 = Very Low … 9 = Very High); means and SDs are linearly",
      "rescaled to the 5-point UC Davis scale shown here. Error bars are clipped to the [1, 5] scale.",
      sep = "\n"
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 9)
  )
```

## UC Davis (Instructor of Record)

### Epi 204

#### 2025

- [Epi 204 Evaluations Summary (2025)](files/evals/evals%20epi%20204%202025%20summary.pdf)

#### 2024

- [Epi 204 Evaluations Summary (2024)](files/evals/Evaluations%20epi%20204%202024%20summary.pdf)

#### 2023

- [Epi 204 Evaluations (Spring 2023)](files/evals/Epi%20204%20Evaluations%20Spring%202023.pdf)

## UCLA (Teaching Assistant)

### Winter 2017

- [Teaching Evaluation 1](files/evals/Morrison%20teaching%20eval%201.pdf)
- [Teaching Evaluation 2](files/evals/Morrison%20teaching%20eval%202.pdf)
